name: Fence Post Calculator
seo_description: Work out how many fence posts and panels you need by fence length, post spacing and height. Free fence calculator with instant material counts.
example_label: Calculate posts for 20m fence with 2m spacing.
result_context: The result main is {postes_ud} postes. Este value serves as referencia to your project.
mistakes: Not descontar huecos of puertas and ventanas
Forget waste per cort is and roturas
Not considering rate of aparejo in consumption
desc: Calculate posts, panels and concrete for fence installation.
